reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)

reviews.comment:
Los baños una mugre, imposibles de usar, minimercado muy básico

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were filthy and unusable; the mini-market was very basic.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwa0xIc2RnEAE

reviews.comment:
Creo que es la peor ypf- ACA que conocí, el baño estaba imposible de ser usado, terriblemente sucio, lleno de moscas. No hay espacio para sentarse a tomar algo ni variedad de productos.

(Translated by Google)
I think it's the worst YPF-ACA I've ever been to. The bathroom was unusable, terribly dirty, and full of flies. There's no space to sit and have a drink, and there's no variety of products.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOdl9qampnRRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) We stopped to refuel and use the restroom. Speaking of restrooms (they aren't very clean, there's no toilet paper, and the day I went, the sinks and floor were full of beetles), the convenience store doesn't serve any savory snacks, only bad, cold, natural sandwiches. At least the drinks are very cold.

(Original)
Paramos para abastecer e ir ao banheiro , por falar em banheiros ( não são muito limpos não tem papel e no dia que fui estava cheio de besouros nas pias e no chão) a loja de conveniência não serve nada de salgados somente lanches naturais ruim que são gelados, as bebidas pelo menos são bem geladas
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxaE95aEpnEAE
